attr.title: Greenlight
attr.desc: Open-source client for Xbox Cloud Gaming (xCloud) and Xbox home streaming
attr.inst: For x86_64 devices: Download the latest release of Greenlight from https://github.com/unknownskl/greenlight/releases and extract the Linux x64 version. Copy the extracted files to the greenlight-bin directory. For ARM devices: Build Greenlight for ARM using the build-arm.sh script or extract the ARM binary following the instructions in docs/ARM_BINARY_INSTALLATION.md. Requires Westonpack runtime.
